name: Vidalia Onion Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in butter until clear and soft (about 15 minutes), stirring often. Add all other ingredients. Mix and pour into the baked pie shells.
2. Sprinkle grated cheese on top. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes, then lower temperature to 350°F for an additional 40 minutes until lightly browned on top.
